creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #3)
Both bsdforge.com and mx99.ultimatedns.net seem to resolve to 24.113.41.81 and I see it listed on Spamhaus ZEN [1], perhaps this is the reason.

[1] https://mxtoolbox.com/SuperTool.aspx?action=blacklist%3a24.113.41.81&run=toolpage
